meaning: n.兰布莱绵羊(一种改良型法国肉毛兼用细毛种羊)
examples: Not long ago, the Clintonites thought they could leave Kosovo diplomacy to their European partners, who led the peace talks at Rambouillet.
Nobody is quite sure how much relevance the Rambouillet deal still has.
He became known outside Kosovo when he formed part of the Kosovar Albanian negotiating team at internationally-sponsored peace talks at Rambouillet, France, early in 1999.
